description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, surrounded by a wooden fence enclosing a front yard, driveway, and a large grassy backyard. The front of the house features a paved driveway with a parked car and a single large tree, while the rear is dominated by an expansive green lawn. The house exterior is finished in a light, uniform color with multiple rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern on both floors. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessed through a gate in the fence, and leads directly to the driveway. The overall design is simple and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, surrounded by a wooden fence, featuring a driveway, car, tree, and large backyard lawn.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry gate, driveway with a car, a large tree, and the house facade with multiple windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the driveway, car, tree, and the transition from paved area to the large grassy backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the expansive backyard lawn and the back of the house with several windows.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the grassy backyard, the house side wall, and the driveway with the car and tree near the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door, accessed via a paved driveway and front gate, no porch or decorative columns.
